overall.description: A slow cinematic pan across the interior of a cozy rustic cabin, showcasing a cast iron stove, wooden furnishings, and a glowing stone fireplace. The warm artificial lighting and detailed wood textures indicate high-quality game engine rendering, creating an intimate autumnal atmosphere.

scene_state.functional_zone: rustic cabin kitchen corner with cast iron stove

agents.ego_description: slowly panning across the cozy cabin interior, focusing on the kitchen area with cast iron stove and wooden shelves

entered.detail: black cast iron cooking stove with pots on top
tall standing lamp with warm glowing shade
wall-mounted wooden shelves holding dishes and decorative items

segments.scene_description: The scene opens on a cozy, warmly lit cabin interior focused on a cast iron stove and kitchen area. The camera slowly pans right, revealing wooden wall paneling, a glowing floor lamp, and shelves with ceramic dishes.

scene_state.functional_zone: cabin living area transition with fireplace coming into view

events.description: stone fireplace with glowing fire enters view on the right side
warm firelight from the stone fireplace becomes more prominent in the scene

agents.ego_description: continuing to pan right, revealing the living area with stone fireplace and window with string lights

entered.detail: large stone fireplace with burning fire inside
large window with sheer curtains and fairy lights
small wooden side table next to the armchair

segments.scene_description: As the camera continues panning right, a glowing stone fireplace enters the frame, shifting the focus to the living area. The warm firelight mixes with the lamp light, illuminating the armchair and a window decorated with string lights.

scene_state.functional_zone: cabin living area centered on stone fireplace

events.description: cast iron stove completely exits the frame, leaving only the living area visible

agents.ego_description: focusing on the stone fireplace and cozy seating area at the end of the room

entered.detail: wooden coat rack with hanging garments
woven area rug on the wooden floor

segments.scene_description: The camera completes its pan to focus on the stone fireplace as the central element, with the armchair and side table arranged nearby. The kitchen area with the cast iron stove is now out of view, emphasizing the cozy living space.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera pan across a rustic cabin interior that shifts from a functional kitchen area to a cozy, firelit living space. It begins focused on a cast iron stove and kitchenware, moving slowly to the right to reveal wooden wall paneling and a glowing floor lamp. As the camera continues its sweep, the warm light of a stone fireplace enters the frame, blending with the lamp light to illuminate a nearby armchair and a window adorned with string lights. The scene then expands to center entirely on the hearth and its surrounding furniture, leaving the kitchen area behind to emphasize the intimate atmosphere of the living room.
